# Beta Plumbing & Rooter

> Plumber serving Schenectady, NY and surrounding areas. Beta Plumbing & Rooter provides quality plumber services in Schenectady, NY. Licensed, insured, and locally trusted.

## Key Facts
- Business: Beta Plumbing & Rooter
- Category: Plumber
- Location: Serving Schenectady, NY, Schenectady, NY
- Phone: 518-555-0202
- Email: contact@beta-plumbing-rooter.com
- Rating: 4.4/5 from 105 reviews
- Years in business: 5
- Jobs completed: 300

## Services
- [Drain Cleaning](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/plumber/beta-plumbing-rooter//services/drain-cleaning/): Fast, effective drain cleaning that clears blockages and keeps water flowing.
- [Pipe Repair](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/plumber/beta-plumbing-rooter//services/pipe-repair/): Expert pipe repair for leaks, bursts, and corrosion in homes and businesses.
- [Water Heater](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/plumber/beta-plumbing-rooter//services/water-heater/): Water heater installation, repair, and maintenance for reliable hot water.
- [Sewer Line](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/plumber/beta-plumbing-rooter//services/sewer-line/): Complete sewer line inspection, cleaning, and repair services.
- [Fixture Install](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/plumber/beta-plumbing-rooter//services/fixture-install/): Professional fixture installation for kitchens, bathrooms, and utility spaces.
- [Emergency Plumbing](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/plumber/beta-plumbing-rooter//services/emergency-plumber/): 24/7 emergency plumbing service when you need it most.
